zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元处于短线震荡偏弱格局，价格持续运行在1750下方，反弹动能不足，整体呈现高位回落后的整理结构，市场情绪偏谨慎，短期承压

SMA20位于1757上方压制明显，价格跌破均线后维持弱势；MACD柱值为负，动能继续衰减，短线反弹缺乏确认信号，市场偏空，需警惕

下方支撑关注1740-1735区间，若跌破或进一步测试1720；上方阻力位于1755及1760一带，需放量突破才可改善结构，波动加剧

操作上建议以反弹高位分批减仓或短线高抛低吸为主，避免追涨杀跌；稳健者等待MACD走平及均线收敛后再考虑入场，信号确认前谨慎控制风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar is currently exhibiting a mild bearish-to-neutral structure after a short-term rejection near recent highs. Price action remains compressed, with ETH trading close to 1744 following a modest 0.6% daily decline. The market is holding just above the intraday low, suggesting limited downside follow-through for now. However, trading below the 20-period SMA indicates that upside momentum has weakened and sellers are gradually gaining control in the short term.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook as bearish pressure remains visible across short-term signals. The MACD is currently negative at -8.90036, reflecting weakening bullish momentum and a possible continuation of downside drift or consolidation. With the signal line unavailable, confirmation is limited, but the histogram behavior still suggests sellers are slightly dominant. The absence of a clear RSI reading further reduces directional conviction, keeping traders focused on price structure rather than indicator extremes.

Key support and resistance levels remain tightly defined due to the current consolidation phase. Immediate support is located around the recent low near 1744, and a break below this zone could expose further downside pressure. On the upside, initial resistance sits near 1755, followed closely by the 20-period SMA at 1757.7, which now acts as a dynamic barrier. A sustained move above this area would be required to re-establish bullish momentum.

Trading conditions suggest a range-bound approach may be more effective until a clearer breakout emerges. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls, while fading strength near resistance could remain viable. However, confirmation of direction should come from a decisive break above 1757.7 or below 1744. In the absence of momentum, preserving capital and avoiding over-leverage remains the most prudent stance in this environment.
